HomePage.title: The easiest way to get feedback on your thumbnails
HomePage.description: Upload your two thumbnails and send links to your friends to help you hone in your best design skills.

CreatePage.title: Create a Thumbnail Test
CreatePage.description: Create your test so that other people can vote on their favorite thumbnail and help you redesign or pick the best options.

CommentsPage.title: Comments
CommentsPage.description: Leave a comment to help the content creator improve their thumbnail designs
CommentsPage.prompt: You must upgrade to view all the feedback users left for you

LocaleSwitcher.label: Change language
LocaleSwitcher.locale: {locale, select, de {🇩🇪 Deutsch} fr {🇫🇷 Français} en {🇺🇸 English} ja {🇯🇵 日本語} ko {🇰🇷 한국어} zh {🇨🇳 中文} other {Unknown}}
